name: io.github.trakkr-aisearch/openai-ads-mcp
title: OpenAI Ads MCP
description: OpenAI and ChatGPT Ads tools for campaigns, creatives, audiences, and insights.

headers.name: X-OpenAI-Ads-API-Key
headers.description: OpenAI Ads API key from Ads Manager. Required for Ads API tool calls; discovery works without it.

environmentVariables.name: OPENAI_ADS_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: OpenAI Ads API key from Ads Manager. Scoped to one ad account.

environmentVariables.name: OPENAI_ADS_MCP_READONLY
environmentVariables.description: Set to 1 for first connection so write tools are hidden.

environmentVariables.name: OPENAI_ADS_BUDGET_CEILING_USD
environmentVariables.description: Optional budget guard for spend-changing tools. Defaults to 100.

environmentVariables.name: OPENAI_ADS_API_KEY
